name: Chaff
description: A Tediore SMG locked to slag damage, offering strong status application and respectable damage over time for its rarity. It is especially useful in longer fights where keeping slag active matters, and its limited pool of valid parts makes it rarer than its color tier might suggest.
notes: Other Tediore SMGs with locked elements include Green for corrosive, Kindle for incendiary, and Spark for shock. It can appear as a normal world drop from suitable loot sources.
